name: question_pairs_merged
description: Merged QA table for STAGE Task 2 screenplay-world question answering.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Row identifier. In the global aggregate file this is prefixed by movie_id.

columns.name: related_scenes
columns.description: Scene title or pipe-separated scene titles for multi-scene questions.

columns.name: related_context
columns.description: Compact supporting context associated with the question.

columns.name: question_type
columns.description: Question category label stored in the current release assets.

columns.name: question_source
columns.description: Origin of the QA item: broad_coverage_scene, broad_coverage_event_chain, or supplementary_cross_scene.
